patterns_recognized: Extreme positive edge (+20pp) picks correlate with model over-confidence, not real edge: SEA@CHW (+31pp, lost 12-8) and NYM@ARI (+23pp, lost 1-3) on 05-08; OAK@BAL (+22.5pp) today carries the same instability signature.

Small-sample hot SP is a systematic model blindspot: Misiorowski ambushed NYY on 05-08; Payton Tolle (3 GS, 2.04 ERA this season) is today's analog for TB@BOS — model underrates limited-data SPs running above expected norms.

COL@PHI recurring failure: same matchup LOST on 05-08 (COL 9-7, PHI heavily favored with large negative edge); today re-appears as PLATINUM with -21.33pp edge and three independent risk flags simultaneously.
Stage 1/2 divergence >0.15 on CHC@TEX (f5=70.6% vs full=46.9%, gap=0.237) signals bullpen-dependency that cannot be verified pre-game; Jacob deGrom starting makes CHC's F5 advantage fragile.

Home-favorite overconfidence at >65% raw prob (calibrator shows ~58% real rate in that bin) requires scrutiny; model rates SEA@CHW at 63% vs market-implied 45% — same directional error magnitude as May 8 catastrophic loss.

WSH @ MIA.reasoning: Edge -5.19pp outside [4,15] band; tier already SKIP. Cade Cavalli (WSH) vs Sandy Alcantara (MIA) with no anomalous signals. fair_prob=0.5643 confirms MIA is a real market favorite; model agrees but lacks conviction to grade. No postgame pattern or live context suggests an override.

OAK @ BAL.reasoning: Raw model 0.725 calibrates to ~0.611 (0.7-0.8 bin: 5/10 actual hits, 50% real rate per calibration table). Edge +22.5pp is well outside [4,15] band — exact signature of 05-08 losses (SEA@CHW +31pp, NYM@ARI +23pp). F1_xera_gap=1.29* carries small-sample asterisk. Stake_mult already zero; DOWNGRADE aligns claude_tier with staking reality.

TB @ BOS.reasoning: Payton Tolle (BOS SP) has only 3 GS in 2026 at 2.04 ERA — a hot small-sample SP matching the Misiorowski pattern that burned NYY@MIL on 05-08. Per heuristic 3, SP-edge is unreliable below 6 starts; the TB pick depends on Tolle being weak while his early-season results say otherwise. F3_swing_take_gap=911.8 is real but insufficient alone against an unknown running hot.

COL @ PHI.reasoning: Four independent failure signals stack: (1) edge -21.33pp triggers heuristic 2 negative-edge cap; (2) PLATINUM tier historically hits ~43% per heuristic 4; (3) this exact matchup LOST on 05-08 (COL 9-7, PHI heavily favored); (4) bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade=True internally flagged by pipeline. Vegas prices PHI at 76.7% while model sees only 55.4% — 21pp market disagreement.

LAA @ TOR.reasoning: Edge +19.41pp outside [4,15] band; already SKIP. Spencer Miles (TOR SP, id=693686) has 0 GS in 2026 — reliever making a spot start with no SP-quality anchor. TOR at 67.4% raw calibrates to ~58%; fair_prob=0.4802 means Vegas is near 50/50. SKIP appropriate given edge band exclusion and SP data uncertainty.

HOU @ CIN.reasoning: Tier SKIP with acute_roster stress warning on HOU. Kai-Wei Teng (HOU SP, id=678906) has limited 2026 SP appearances. HOU won this same matchup 10-0 on 05-08 but today's acute_roster flag introduces uncertainty the model cannot price. Andrew Abbott (CIN) is a quality arm. SKIP designation confirmed.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: bullpen_fatigue warning flags CLE bullpen overuse. CLE at 65.93% raw calibrates to ~58% (0.6-0.7 bin real rate). Andrew Morris (MIN SP, id=702193) has 0 GS in 2026 — spot start — making SP-edge unreliable bidirectionally. confidence_downgrade=True already internally set. SKIP designation appropriate.

SEA @ CHW.reasoning: Exact repeat of May 8 failure pattern: model rates CHW at 63% while market prices CHW at only 45.1% (fair_prob), an 18pp over-confidence gap. May 8 produced a catastrophic 12-8 SEA win when CHW was at +31pp. Today Logan Gilbert (established ace) starts for SEA vs Davis Martin (back-end rotation) for CHW — a clear pitching advantage the model direction ignores. Game already SKIP; directional flip to SEA warranted.

NYY @ MIL.reasoning: Carlos Rodón has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date (returning from absence) — SP-edge score impossible. Logan Henderson (MIL SP, id=701656) has very limited 2026 MLB data. This exact matchup on 05-08 was a LOSS when model underestimated MIL's rookie SP Misiorowski. PENDING status is correct; no reliable pick can be forced.

CHC @ TEX.reasoning: Stage 1/2 disagreement is extreme: f5=0.706 vs full=0.469, gap=0.237 — well above 0.15 threshold. CHC's full-game thesis depends on bullpen that cannot be verified as rested. Jacob deGrom (TEX SP, id=594798) is an elite arm — external_modifiers flag and confidence_downgrade=True both set internally. deGrom going 6+ innings eliminates CHC's F5 advantage entirely.

PIT @ SF.reasoning: Stage 1/2 disagreement of 0.199 is above 0.15 threshold but no bullpen_fatigue flag and no confidence_downgrade. Bubba Chandler (PIT SP, id=696149) has 7 GS in 2026 — meets the 6-start reliability threshold. F2_xwoba_gap=0.031 is a real lineup signal. SF is 15-24 — weakest team on the slate. Edge 4.99pp at minimum qualifying level with no stacking red flags.

NYM @ ARI.reasoning: Near-zero edge (+1.15pp); already SKIP. 0.5115 calibrates to just 0.478 (0.5-0.6 bin real rate) — calibrator tips below 50% for ARI. bullpen_fatigue and confidence_downgrade=True flagged. May 8 same matchup was a LOSS for ARI (picked at 68%, lost 1-3). Today's model conviction is dramatically reduced — appropriate.

STL @ SD.reasoning: Tier SKIP despite edge 12.28pp being nominally in-band — grader filters correctly excluded this. Extreme Stage 1/2 divergence: f5=0.793 vs full=0.442, gap=0.351 (largest on the slate). Kyle Leahy's SP edge collapses entirely in the full game. Walker Buehler (SD) is a quality arm. SKIP is prudent given the irreconcilable F5/full split.

ATL @ LAD.reasoning: F3_swing_take_gap=1851.7 is a large, SP-independent lineup signal and the primary driver here. Stage 1/2 gap is minimal (f5=0.709 vs full=0.650, gap=0.059). Raw 0.6503 calibrates to ~0.58 (0.6-0.7 bin real rate 56.9%); calibrated still exceeds fair_prob 0.5522, preserving ~3pp real edge. This exact matchup was a WIN on 05-08 (LAD 3-1). Justin Wrobleski (LAD SP) has <6 GS but F3 is primary, not SP-edge.

DET @ KC.reasoning: Brenan Hanifee (DET SP) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. Noah Cameron (KC SP, id=702070) also has very limited 2026 data. Both arms are opaque to the feature pipeline. PENDING designation is correct; no reliable pick can be generated.
